form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 4th in a small field at Chelmsford on March 26 over 2000m, 3.5 len behind Engross carrying 60kg at $10. Previously second-up ran on from midfield; 3rd of 12 at Wolverhampton on September 20 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind Deluded carrying 60.5kg at $19. Plenty of improvement to come.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 3rd of 8 at Lingfield All Weather on March 20 over 1600m, 8 len behind Politely carrying 56kg at $7.50. Previously second-up 2nd of 9 at Doncaster on June 28 over 1400m, 0.8 len behind Wetsand with 57kg at $4.50. Further improvement in store.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation seventh of 10 at Wolverhampton December 22 over 1400m, 9 len behind Free Your Spirit carrying 60.5kg at $8. On debut ninth of 11 at Salisbury October 2 over 1600m, 19 len behind Runman with 60.5kg at $101. Among the main contenders.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 39-day let-up. First-up after two months 9th of 12 at this track on March 5 over 1400m, 6 len behind Kingofthecarnival with 61kg at $21. Previously second-up ran last of 7 at this track on December 19 over 1400m, 12 len behind Thestral with 60.5kg at $34. Hard to get excited about his chances.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months ran last in a small field at Wolverhampton on March 16 over 2400m, 9 len behind Magnetude carrying 53kg at $29. Previously second-up ran last of 10 at Haydock Park on September 5 over 1600m, 21 len behind Legacy Link carrying 58kg at $251. That run was a bit plain so prefer her later on.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months 8th of 11 at this track on March 19 over 1400m, 17 len behind Infinite Dream with 55.5kg at $201. Previously second-up second last of 9 at this track on October 4 over 1200m, 9 len behind Arrabbiata with 58kg at $126. Others offer more appeal.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation third in a small field at this track October 2 over 2000m, 6 len behind Captain Bruce with 56kg at $5.50. On debut eighth of 10 at this track July 26 over 1400m, 20 len behind Sudbury Hill with 56kg at $51. Solid top-three chance.
